body:
Implementation plan added to issue description.

- New files: `src/types/revision.ts`, `src/lib/revision.ts`, `src/components/RevisionPassPanel/*`
- Modified: `src/app/story/[id]/page.tsx`, `page.module.css`
- Key decisions: pass items generated algorithmically from scene metadata (no AI); rationale enforced at save time not on blur; export via Blob/createObjectURL plain-text download; scene jump switches viewMode to corkboard; sidebar tab bar expanded (check if prior tickets added it)

Assign to: Code Monkey
Recovery ticket; previous BIN-81 stuck (checkout 409) and cancelled.
